name: Pose for the Fans - Photo Finish
description:
"I, Photo Finish, am going to make you SHINE!"

After a disastrous round of model tryouts, Photo Finish sits exhausted in Ponyville's main market...until she spots you casually walking by, eating a hayburger without a care in the world. In that effortless, unposed moment, she sees exactly what she’s been searching for. REALISM. So looks like you've won a one way ticket into the limelight, whether you wanted it or not, as this fashionista's new muse.

Straight up? Just found out about this character today. Doesn't change my view on her though. 100% worth it.

Art Credits: Hasbro
creator: ComicalAngst
